def: An instrument used by masons and others to trace and formangles.
The strong ligament of the back of the neck in quadrupeds. Itconnects the back of the skull with dorsal spines of the cervicalvertebræ, and helps to support the head. Called also paxywaxy andpackwax.
A colorless, volatile, alkaline liquid, NH(C2H5)2, having astrong fishy odor resembling that of herring or sardines. Cf.Methylamine.

Any one of the three metameric hydrocarbons, C5H12, of themethane or paraffin series. They are colorless, volatile liquids, twoof which occur in petroleum. So called because of the five carbonatoms in the molecule.
In the United States navy, a sick-bay nurse; -- now officiallydesignated as hospital apprentice.
Of or pertaining to the planet Uranus; as, the Uranian year.
In any framed work, a horizontal tie other than sill and plateor other principal ties, securing uprights to one another.
The work of the painter; also, any work of art in which objectsare represented in color on a flat surface; a colored representationof any object or scene; a picture.
